features.name: class_inline_randomize_with_rand_mode_control
features.description: Code should include a class with rand members, randomize() call with inline constraints using 'with', and variable randomization mode control. The randomize() method on a class instance with inline constraints can trigger V3Randomize to incorrectly place a read-only reference on the LHS of an assignment when the access mode is not properly checked.
features.snippet:
class Bar; rand int x; constraint c { x inside {1,2,3}; } endclass
Bar bar; initial randomize(bar) with { x > 0; };

features.name: member_access_randmode_internal_var
features.description: Code should include member selection on a class instance accessing internal randomization state (__Vrandmode). Verilator internally generates member selection nodes for rand_mode control, and when this access is used in assignment context with ignored access parameter, it produces invalid AST with read references on assignment LHS.
